class.name: OTelReflector
class.brief_description: Loads and merges OTLP JSON files from disk into [OTelState].
class.description: Utility for reading back exported OTLP files; supports glob discovery and multi-file merging.

method.name: find_otlp_files
method.description: Returns all files matching [param pattern] under [param directory].

method.name: get_document
method.description: Returns the shared [OTelDocument] used for deserialization.

method.name: load_and_merge_logs
method.description: Loads and merges all log files at [param paths] into a single [OTelState].

method.name: load_and_merge_metrics
method.description: Loads and merges all metrics files at [param paths] into a single [OTelState].

method.name: load_and_merge_traces
method.description: Loads and merges all trace files at [param paths] into a single [OTelState].

method.name: load_logs_from_file
method.description: Reads the OTLP log JSON file at [param path] and returns an [OTelState].

method.name: load_logs_from_json
method.description: Parses the OTLP log JSON string and returns an [OTelState].

method.name: load_metrics_from_file
method.description: Reads the OTLP metrics JSON file at [param path] and returns an [OTelState].

method.name: load_metrics_from_json
method.description: Parses the OTLP metrics JSON string and returns an [OTelState].

method.name: load_traces_from_file
method.description: Reads the OTLP trace JSON file at [param path] and returns an [OTelState].

method.name: load_traces_from_json
method.description: Parses the OTLP trace JSON string and returns an [OTelState].
